issuetype.name: Epic

fields.customfield_13538: This ticket type "New request" is obsolete! Please change the ticket type above ↑

comments.body: Reopen to discuss in PI29 PIP.
I think this ticket should be checked by HMI side.

1st step: CAN support (MCU side)
2nd step: VHAL development
3rd step: service development
[~NIK00207] San, Nissan FO need to input Validation plan for the EPIC. Requesting to please check LGE EPIC/Story plan and please input validation plan please.

Dear All,

I just want to share that Epic is dependent by Nissan's FO Backlight feedback as I mentioned on that comment:

[https://spaws.jp.nissan.biz/jira/browse/CDCFM-17622?focusedId=2743205&page=com.atlassian.jira.plugin.system.issuetabpanels:comment-tabpanel#comment-2743205]

Many thanks
Behavior is same as P33C and official spec will be released by end of this month.

Dear [~NIK00207] - san, [~TTC02140] - san,

cc: [~LGEJ-LGEJ149], [~LGEJ-LGEJ247] 

 

Thank for your information

Regarding to the spec release version by end of this month, the LGe will leave the estimation and plan after that.

Please help me note that.

Many thanks,

Nhi Le
EPIC is moved to Backlog since specification will be released in PI30 and planning will be done after specification release.

Dear [~TTC02160] -san

This ticket status is Backlogged and progressing to PI30.

Can I change Verification Done (Plan) and Validation Done (Plan) to None?

Thank you.

 

cc [~LGEJ-LGEJ11]

Hello [~NIK00207] san,

Could you please share the updated spec as discussed from PI29.

BRs,
